purpose: Authorize a governed UI/ASCII sketch projection before any rendering implementation exists.

canonicalNodes.statement: The sketch projection requires bounded story, spec, and projection-manifest inputs.
The projection can emit a governed ASCII sketch output rather than rendered UI code.
The projection can carry evidence that the sketch was declared and later rendered through governed contracts only.

rules.statement: No executable UI or ASCII sketch body may introduce behavior not named in story, canonical spec, schemas, manifests, and evidence expectations.
